failure_modes.potential_cause: Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.5 (DN.01-A primary) outage; FR.03 fallback LLM provider not warm
failure_modes.potential_effect: System unavailability during outage window — availability criterion breach

landed_controls.summary: Spec Generator (Fallback LLM) — circuit-breaker fallback when primary DE.13 unavailable. redundancy_source_fm=FM.12 per form_function_map.

failure_modes.notes: FM.12 mitigation crossed redundancy-keyword threshold in T5; FR.03 was added explicitly to discharge it (form_function_map decision_audit DA.02).

failure_modes.failure_mode: Primary/fallback LLM split-brain: divergent specs on transient primary degradation
failure_modes.potential_cause: Primary Claude Sonnet 4.5 (FR.02) returns degraded but non-error responses near circuit-breaker threshold; some requests hit fallback (FR.03), others primary, producing two valid-but-divergent draft specs for the same DE.01 founder prompt
failure_modes.potential_effect: Founder review (FR.04) presented inconsistent spec history; loss of determinism for traceback (FR.09) lineage
failure_modes.open_residual_risk: No request-level provider stickiness; circuit-breaker (interface_specs IF.01..IF.10 error_rate_threshold_pct=25) trips at session granularity but does not pin a single founder session to one provider. Recommended next-cycle ADR: pin (founder_id, project_id) → provider for session lifetime.

failure_modes.failure_mode: Event-bus cascade failure: IF.06 streaming backlog starves IF.10 feedback loop
failure_modes.potential_cause: LangGraph (DN.03-A) state-machine consumes IF.06 event-bus and IF.10 in-process stream from same async runtime; IF.06 backlog under burst saturates the runtime, blocking IF.10 message dispatch from FR.09 → FR.08
failure_modes.potential_effect: Recommendation feedback loop stalls; FM.06 cadence breach amplified beyond shed-load capacity
failure_modes.open_residual_risk: No isolation between IF.06 and IF.10 runtimes in chosen LangGraph topology. ADR candidate: separate consumer pool for streaming vs in-process interfaces, or migrate IF.06 to dedicated worker process.

failure_modes.failure_mode: pgvector index drift: HNSW recall degrades silently after corpus growth
failure_modes.potential_cause: DN.02-A pgvector (Supabase Postgres) HNSW index parameters (m, ef_construction) tuned for initial corpus size; as DE.09 catalog grows past T3 baseline (3289 chunks), recall drops without rebuild. T3 wave-1 noted HNSW as a deferred carry-over.
failure_modes.potential_effect: FR.09 Traceback Service silently misses citation matches; FM.07 fail-closed kicks in at higher rate, blocking emit (DE.10) for valid recommendations

landed_controls.summary: FM.07 fail-closed surfaces missed citations as emit refusals — partial detectability via secondary symptom

failure_modes.open_residual_risk: No periodic recall benchmark scheduled. ADR candidate: add weekly recall@k probe over canonical query set; trigger HNSW rebuild when recall drops below 0.9.

failure_modes.failure_mode: Vercel cold-start tax violates IF.06 streaming SLA on FR.06 adapter
failure_modes.potential_cause: DN.04-A Vercel serverless cold-starts on FR.06 Customer-System Adapter exceed IF.06 p95_latency_ms=800 SLA after idle window; first metric burst after wake-up dropped or batched
failure_modes.potential_effect: Customer metric stream (DE.08) loses leading edge; FR.07 ingest gap-marker fires false-positive, NFR.05 invariant tripped

landed_controls.summary: interface_specs IF.06 timeout_ms=1600 + retry max_attempts=3 absorbs first cold-start

failure_modes.open_residual_risk: Vercel free/pro tier cold-start latency is non-contractual. ADR candidate: warm FR.06 via scheduled ping or migrate FR.06 to long-running Cloud Run (matches identity-api pattern in monorepo recommendation).
